raw.official description: Regenerate 30 health per second for each enemy targeted by Deadeye.
raw.heal: 40/s per target
raw.ability details: * Targets must be in view and fulfill the conditions for accumulating damage to also count for healing.

heal.raw: 40/s per target

raw.official description: Critical hits with Primary Fire reduce the cooldown of Combat Roll by 3 seconds.
Deadeye refunds 40% Ultimate Charge if it fully expires.
raw.ability details: * Replaced by [[File:Even_The_Odds.png|sub|link=Cassidy#Even the Odds|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Cassidy#Even the Odds|Even the Odds]] in Season 16.

raw.official description: Fan the Hammer shots are individually controlled and can crit for 50% more damage.
raw.ability details:
* ''Removed in Season 18.''
* Hold down secondary fire to rapid-fire the entire clip (like normal).
* Secondary Fire can be tapped to shoot individually or held to shoot continuously.
* Whether shooting individually or continuously, Secondary Fire can now be cancelled without consuming all remaining ammo.

raw.official description: Combat Roll also heals 15 health for each bullet reloaded.
raw.ability details: * Despite being intended for Combat Roll, [[File:Ability-mccree4.png|sub|link=Cassidy#Deadeye|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Cassidy#Deadeye|Deadeye]] can also trigger this Perk's healing.

raw.shot type: [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: Roll in the direction you're moving to take reduced damage and reload.
raw.ability details:
* Can be used while airborne.
* Cassidy can roll off ledges.
* Travels in the direction Cassidy is walking, not the direction he is facing (unless he is not moving).
* Movement is not blocked by enemy player collision.
* Destroys fences and other breakables Cassidy collides with while rolling.

abilities.name: Flashbang
shot_type: [[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.shot type:
[[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile
[[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
raw.official description: Hinder enemies in front of you, slowing them and preventing them from using movement abilities.
raw.cast time: 0.13 + 0.6 seconds
raw.ability details: * Flashbang explodes immediately upon hitting an enemy or terrain or upon reaching its maximum range, applying its effects to all enemies in radius. * Enemy heroes hit by the explosion take damage and become "[[hindered]]", interrupting and preventing movement abilities and crouching for the duration and [[slow]]ing them. See [[Movement speed#Movement abilities|Movement abilities]] for a list of affected abilities. * The hindered status can be removed by effects that grant [[phased out]] status, such as [[File:Protection_Suzu_Icon.png|sub|link=Kiriko#Protection Suzu|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Kiriko#Protection Suzu|Protection Suzu]]. * The projectile can be destroyed while in air by [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]], [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]], [[File:Perk_PowerMatrix.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Power Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Power Matrix|Power Matrix]] and [[File:ULT Kekkai Sancturary.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|Kekkai Sanctuary]] and reflected by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]], but the splash is unaffected. * [[File:Baptiste-ability4.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|Amplification Matrix]] affects all damage dealt, if the projectile passes through it. Splash damage alone going through is not amplified.

abilities.name: Magnetic Grenade
shot_type: [[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.shot type:
[[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile
[[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
raw.official description: Throw a homing grenade that sticks to enemies, slowing them and preventing them from using movement abilities.
raw.cast time: 0 + 0.4 seconds
raw.duration:
0.75 seconds (homing limit)
1.5 seconds (max travel time)
1.25 seconds (stick duration)
raw.ability details: * Replaced in Season 11 by reworked [[File:Magnetic_Grenade.png|sub|link=Cassidy#Flashbang|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Cassidy#Flashbang|Flashbang]]. * The grenade has a travel time limit which corresponds to ~37.5m distance along the grenade's trajectory. * While in air, the grenade locks on to the first hero that enters 1.3 meter radius of the projectile. Once locked on, the grenade will continuously chase them regardless of range or until it reaches its homing or maximum travel time limit. ** The grenade will follow locked heroes through movement abilities, unless the ability causes the hero to phase out, which disjoints the grenade. ** The grenade will explode if fails to reach the hero it was locked on to within the aforementioned time limit. * The grenade will stick to enemies and surfaces upon contact. The stuck grenade explodes after 1.25 seconds, dealing damage in an area. ** The enemy hero that is stuck by the grenade becomes "[[hindered]]", interrupting and preventing movement abilities for the duration. See [[Movement speed#Movement abilities]] for a list of affected abilities. ** The grenade can be unstuck by [[File:Protection_Suzu_Icon.png|sub|link=Kiriko#Protection Suzu|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Kiriko#Protection Suzu|Protection Suzu]], removing the hindered status. * The projectile can be destroyed while in air by [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]] and [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]] and reflected by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]], but a stuck grenade and the splash are unaffected. * [[File:Baptiste-ability4.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|Amplification Matrix]] affects all damage dealt, if the projectile passes through it. Splash damage alone going through is not amplified.

duration.raw:
0.75 seconds (homing limit)
1.5 seconds (max travel time)
1.25 seconds (stick duration)

abilities.name: Magnetic Grenade (old)
shot_type: [[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.shot type:
[[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile
[[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
raw.official description: Throw a short-range grenade that homes in on nearby enemies and deals additional damage if it sticks to them.
raw.ability details: * Reworked in Season 5. * Explodes immediately upon reaching maximum range. * If the grenade sticks to an enemy or terrain, it explodes after a delay. * Movement abilities that teleport can unstick the grenade. * The projectile can be destroyed while in air by [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]] and [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]] and reflected by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]], but a stuck grenade and the splash are unaffected. * [[File:Baptiste-ability4.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|Amplification Matrix]] affects all damage dealt, if the projectile passes through it. Splash damage alone going through is not amplified.

raw.shot type: [[File:Icon-ability.tacticalvisor.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Hitscan|Hitscan ]] Hitscan
raw.official description: Peacekeeper's secondary fire is replaced with a piercing shot that inflicts bleeding. Combat Roll and Deadeye reset its cooldown.
raw.ability details: * Holding secondary fire causes Cassidy to aim down sights. Pressing primary fire then fires the shot. * Base damage from the shot can [[critical hit]], dealing double damage, but bleed damage is unaffected. * Shot pierces enemies and deployables, excluding [[barrier]]s. * Base damage can be boosted by [[File:Baptiste-ability4.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|Amplification Matrix]], bleed damage cannot. * Bleed damage counts as a [[damage over time]] effect. It can be cleansed and it ignores [[armor]].

abilities.name: Deadeye

raw.shot type: [[File:Icon-ability.tacticalvisor.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Hitscan|Hitscan ]] Hitscan
raw.official description: Face off against your enemies. Press Q to lock on, then Q or [[File:Key mouse 1.png|20x20px|link=]] to fire.
raw.damage:
150 per second (during warning)
300 per second (remaining duration)
raw.fire rate: 8.93 shots/s
raw.cast time:
0.7 + 0.3 seconds (when fired)
0.3 + 0.4 seconds (when canceled)
raw.ability details: * Activating Deadeye instantly replenishes Peacekeeper's ammo. * Deadeye can be canceled using Secondary Fire ([[File:Key mouse 2.png|20x20px|link=]]). * Deadeye is a [[channeled]] ability; getting [[stunned]], [[knocked down]] or [[hacked]], immediately ends the ability without firing. ** Cassidy cannot jump, crouch or use other abilities while channeling Deadeye. * After Deadeye has been active for 2 seconds (warning time), its charge rate is increased and its movement speed penalty and damage reduction fade to their minimum values over the next 1.4 seconds. * If the duration runs out, Deadeye ends without firing. * Deadeye can only lock on to heroes, [[File:Ability-ashe4.png|sub|link=Ashe#B.O.B.|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ashe#B.O.B.|B.O.B.]] and Baptiste's [[File:Baptiste-ability3.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Immortality Field|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Immortality Field|Immortality Field]]. * The targeting area of Deadeye is a 105° wide 3D cone. The player's field-of-view (FOV) settings does not affect this area, meaning that Deadeye may be able to target enemies outside of view (especially vertically) or vice versa, depending on the setting. * Despite the visuals in-game, the shots are actually aimed at a point at the target's chest instead of their head.'"`UNIQ--ref-00000063-QINU`"' ** If the line of sight to this point is obstructed or it is outside the targeting area, the charging is paused and continues from the same amount when the line of sight is restored. * The lock on is removed and any accumulated damage is reset if the target becomes [[invisible]]. * Deadeye cannot be fired unless there is at least one target with unobstructed line of sight within the targeting area. * [[Barrier]]s and invulnerability states ([[phased out]], [[invincible]]) can negate/block the shots, but they do not prevent locking on, pause charging or prevent the hero from being fired at. ** [[Venture]]'s Burrow prevents lock on and pauses the charging. ** Other [[objects]] and players in front of the intended target can also block the shots. * The damage relative to the target's health is displayed as a closing red circle. If the accumulated damage is above an enemy's remaining health, a skull will appear. ** The indicator tracks the location of any enemy that has been locked on to through walls as long as the target has not become [[invisible]]. ** The indicator takes into account any [[Damage modification|damage mitigations and amplifications]], excluding [[File:Baptiste-ability4.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|Amplification Matrix]]. * In a normal game (and without modifiers like Mercy's damage amplify), the maximum possible damage per target is 1,800. * While unlikely in a normal game scenario, Deadeye can lock on to and shoot at more than 6 targets simultaneously. ** Ammo remaining in Peacekeeper's cylinder is not relevant as Deadeye will keep firing even if it runs out of ammo.
